case_title: BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP vs. GARCIA, GABRIEL et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, GABRIEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 160 BRANNAN ST 3426, LEASE FORFEITED, CLERK'S NOTATION RENDERED ON ORIGINAL LEASE- CRC 522.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BAYSIDE VILLAGE ASSOCIATES, A PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, GABRIEL DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
